landing.hero_title: Touch-type by motion, not by hunting keys.
landing.tagline: FlowTyping shows the path each finger travels — home to key and back. Accuracy and rhythm first; speed follows.
landing.demo_aria: Demonstration: a finger travels from its home key to the target and back; each finger has its own color.

principles.title: The path, not the key
principles.body: We show the route a finger takes to a key and back — you learn the motion, not a picture on the screen.

principles.title: Always home
principles.body: Every keystroke ends back on the ASDF–JKL; home row. Your hands always know where they are.

principles.title: Rhythm over rushing
principles.body: Even intervals between keystrokes. Accuracy leads — speed arrives on its own.

landing.philosophy_lead: Ordinary trainers highlight a key — and you watch the screen. FlowTyping draws the motion — and you feel the keyboard.
landing.philosophy_old_text: Highlights the key. Your eyes stay tied to the screen.
landing.philosophy_new_text: Shows the finger's path. Eyes free, memory in the hands.
landing.closing_text: A few minutes a day. Accuracy before speed.

settings.title: User Preferences
settings.display_name_description: Shown next to your avatar. Leave empty to use the name from your provider.
settings.finger_layout_description: Hand placement scheme (which finger presses each key).
settings.cursor_type_description: Shape of the cursor in the typing line.
settings.cursor_mode_description: Where the cursor sits in the line (typed vs upcoming ratio).

stats_sessions.title: Training sessions
stats_sessions.guest: Sign in to see your session history

repertoire_progress.title: Step progress
repertoire_progress.guest_invite: Sign in to save step progress
